zh.lifeSummary: 當Euphemia Aske於大約1399年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾易亞斯比阿斯可時，她的父親Roger Aske20歲，母親Elizabeth Pert20歲。她於大約1412年與John Langton在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1463年在英國英格蘭享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾利德斯利德斯 明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Aske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Staffordshire): topographic name from northern Middle English ask ‘ash tree’ (Old Norse askr), or a habitational name from Aske (North Yorkshire). Compare Ash .

variants.name: Ash
meanings: English: from Middle English asche ‘ash tree’ (Old English æsc), hence a topographic name for someone living by an ash tree or a habitational name from any of the many places in southern and central England named with this word (Derbyshire, Dorset, Hampshire, Herefordshire, Kent, Surrey, Shropshire, Somerset, and elsewhere).
Americanized form of German   Asch   and   Esch  , the latter ultimately also of Swiss German origin (see   Oesch  ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , with the same meaning as 1 above.

variants.name: Axe
meanings: English (West Yorkshire, Lincolnshire): variant of Aske with metathesis of /sk/ to /ks/, spelled with an x.

English (Dorset, Somerset): habitational name from Axe Farm in Chardstock (Devon, formerly in Dorset), itself named for the river Axe, which forms part of the south-eastern boundary of Chardstock parish.
Americanized form of German   Axt   or perhaps of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Euphemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a Late Greek name derived from eu ‘well, good’ + phēnai ‘to speak’. This was the name of various early saints, notably a virgin martyr said to have been burned at the stake at Chalcedon in 307 . It had a limited popularity in some regions in the 16th and 17th centuries and returned to favour in the Victorian period, especially in the pet form Effie . It is little used at present.

en.lifeSummary: When Euphemia Aske was born about 1399, in Aske, Easby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Aske, was 20 and her mother, Elizabeth Pert, was 20. She married John Langton about 1412, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1463, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Leeds Minster, Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Euphemia Aske est née environ 1399, à Aske, Easby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Aske, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Pert, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Langton environ 1412, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1463, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Leeds Minster, Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1412 in England John Langton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1463 im Alter von 66 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Leeds Minster, Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.St Peter Minster Churchyard, Leeds, Metr: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈 리드즈 민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Euphemia Aske(이)가 대략 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스비 아스크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Aske(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Pert(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1412년 영국에서 John Langton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1463년 영국 잉글랜드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈 리드즈 민스터에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Langton aproximadamente 1412, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.St Peter Minster Churchyard, Leeds, Metr: лидс минстир, лидс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Euphemia Aske родилась около 1399 г. в местности аск, эасби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger Aske было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Pert, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Langton около 1412 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1463 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности лидс минстир, лидс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
